apiJob.title: Senior Manager, Brand Management – League of Legends: Wild Rift
apiJob.description:
Brand ManagementSenior Manager, Brand Management – League of Legends: Wild RiftShanghai, ChinaJob Id: REQ-0009763Riot Games was founded in 2006 by a group of passionate gamers who believed that player-focused development could create truly exceptional games. In 2009, we released League of Legends to critical and global acclaim. Today, it remains one of the world’s most-played games, with millions of players engaging each month. Players are the foundation of everything we do, and it’s for them that we continue to challenge ourselves, evolve our craft, and push the boundaries of what great experiences can look like. Brand Management at Riot exists to earn and protect player trust, inspire curiosity and interest, and help define the meaning behind our games and experiences. We believe a strong brand connects deeply with players, tells an authentic story, and leads them toward memorable experiences. As the Sr. Manager, Brand Management for League of Legends: Wild Rift, you will own the end-to-end brand narrative and holistic global brand & product marketing strategy for Wild Rift. You’ll develop a deep understanding of current players and future audiences across an ever-evolving competitive and cultural landscape. You will lead a talented team of brand managers to create bold, culturally resonant, and player-centered integrated experiences—experiences that capture imagination, fuel long-term engagement, and expand Wild Rift’s global footprint. This role is both highly strategic and hands-on. You will operate at senior altitudes while maintaining the curiosity, analytical rigor, and adaptability needed to continuously optimize campaign craft and player engagement. You are a collaborative leader who thrives in ambiguity, a mentor who invests in people’s growth, and a connector who brings teams together to achieve outcomes no single discipline can achieve alone. In this Shanghai-based role, you will also work closely with regional publishing teams and Tencent partners to align on strategy, strengthen market presence, and ensure Wild Rift’s brand evolves meaningfully across diverse global audiences. Responsibilities: Leadership & Team Development Build, guide, and inspire a high-performing brand management team that drives sustainable player growth and champions excellence in brand craft. Mentor and support career development for team members while ensuring work quality meets world-class expectations and discipline standards. Foster a team culture rooted in Riot’s values—player empathy, craft mastery, curiosity, and respect for diverse perspectives. Brand Strategy & Vision In partnership with Game Leadership, evolve and articulate a differentiated global brand strategy for Wild Rift across multiple platforms. Drive long-term brand vision, objectives, and roadmapping, ensuring coherence between brand ambition and player needs. Lead the development of culturally relevant narratives that resonate across global markets and inspire players and partners alike. Integrated Product Marketing & Campaign Excellence Own campaign strategy, player journeys, and marketing frameworks for all global Wild Rift beats—including engagement, player sentiment, awareness, consideration, and acquisition. Leverage insights, experimentation, and continuous optimization to elevate campaign craft and performance. Champion cross-disciplinary collaboration with Game Development, Publishing, and Shared Services teams to deliver innovative, high-quality, and integrated player experiences. Global Publishing & Regional Partnership Provide strategic guidance and oversight to regional publishing teams to ensure brand cohesion and impactful local executions across the globe. Serve as the accountable leader for day-to-day partnership with Tencent (K6) as the publisher of Wild Rift in China—including alignment on brand strategy, partnership management, community communication, and cross-team coordination. Anticipate emerging market opportunities and player needs to guide brand evolution in a dynamic global landscape. Insights, Measurement & Craft Maturity Set top-level KPIs for marketing efforts, guide measurement plans, and collaborate with research partners to deepen understanding of current and future audiences. Elevate the team’s ability to integrate insights, cultural analysis, and player feedback into strategies and creative development. Game Leadership Contribution Contribute to Wild Rift’s broader game leadership discussions, helping shape long-term strategy for the game and the League of Legends ecosystem. Advocate for player-first decision-making and cohesive storytelling across all touchpoints. Required Qualifications: 8+ years of brand and/or product marketing experience in games, entertainment, or adjacent categories. 3+ years of management experience in an international, matrixed organization. Demonstrated success in campaign strategy, development, and execution. Proven ability to both drive measurable business outcomes and elevate brand resonance. Deep familiarity with the fast-moving global games marketing landscape, competition, and emerging trends. Fluency in both Mandarin Chinese and English, with the ability to build strong relationships and guide teams across language and culture. Exceptional communication skills and executive presence—both written and verbal. Experience building communication frameworks that reconcile cultural, technological, and product requirements with clarity and alignment. Desired Qualifications: Experience working on cross-platform game products. Experience contributing to globally recognized brands with passionate, highly engaged audiences. Experience operating in mature live-service environments, and across different stages of product development. Experience partnering with or facilitating work across strategy, creative, or brand agencies. Strong organizational management and cross-functional leadership skills. Apply

ArtSenior Technical Artist, Animation - Unpublished R&D ProductLos Angeles, USAJob Id: REQ-0009735As a Senior Technical Artist (Technical Animation), you’ll define and maintain the systems that bring our characters and creatures to life including complex animation state machines, layered interactions, and IK-driven behaviors in our upcoming MMO. Working at the intersection of animation, design, and engineering, you’ll build scalable animation graphs, ensure believable motion, and optimize performance across a vast, dynamic world. You’ll collaborate with animators, designers, and engineers to develop robust Unreal Engine animation systems that balance scalability, fidelity, and efficiency. As a key bridge between creative intent and technical execution, you’ll drive the evolution of our animation framework and ensure seamless, high-quality integration across the game. Responsibilities: Build and maintain complex animation state machines, layered animation systems, and override logic supporting split-body for player characters, NPCs, creatures, and props. Collaborate with animators, character tech artists, and designers to develop efficient, believable, and tech-friendly animation flows. Define best practices for animation setup while owning the debuggability, documentation, maintainability, and long-term health of animation blueprints and graphs within Unreal Engine. Partner with engineers to build and evolve animation runtime systems and debugging workflows. Drive optimization efforts across animation assets and graphs to meet performance and memory targets. Collaborate with cross-discipline partners to ensure character systems scale effectively across massive multiplayer environments. Develop scalable animation retargeting strategies to support characters and creatures of varying proportions while minimizing animation counts. Required Qualifications: 5+ years of professional experience as a technical animator or technical artist in games or related industries. Deep expertise with Unreal Engine animation workflows, including complex Animation Blueprints, state machines, blend spaces, and layered animation systems. Proven experience designing scalable, reusable animation systems for large-scope character setups, including players, NPCs, and creatures. Strong art foundation with a deep understanding of animation principles, anatomy, and motion. Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate across art, design, and engineering disciplines Desired Qualifications: Experience with Unreal Control Rig and Sequencer Familiarity with C++ and/or Python within Unreal Engine. Expertise in Autodesk Maya for rigging and animation support. Experience working with software like Kawaii, Chaos, Havok. Prior experience supporting MMO or large-scale games with complex character ecosystems. apiJob.title: VFX Artist - VALORANT, Characters
apiJob.description:
ArtVFX Artist - VALORANT, CharactersLos Angeles, USAJob Id: REQ-0009215As part of the Real-Time VFX team, you’ll design and help implement the sleek, dynamic and dramatic special effects that add atmosphere and depth to gameplay. With your experience, you’ll create aesthetically astounding visual effects that communicate essential game information. You’ll use your artistic and technical skills to breathe life into undead spells, channel primal emotions and capture the essence of hundreds of champions. VALORANT is Riot’s take on a character-based tactical shooter (for more info on VALORANT click here!). As a VFX Artist on the VALORANT team, you will work closely with other VALORANT artists to communicate each effect’s actions, impact, and tonal experience, ultimately helping to bring the characters’ VFX to life. Responsibilities: Design and help implement the sleek, dynamic, and dramatic special effects that add atmosphere and depth to the gameplay Balance visual satisfaction and gameplay clarity while working to ensure amazing effects are accurately representing a given action or state Create aesthetically astounding visual effects that communicate essential game information and capture the essence of hundreds of characters Use your craft skills to draw, paint, animate and model with equal proficiency as-needed Use your encyclopedic knowledge of visual effects to synthesize brand new assets from classic designs Find creative and effective solutions to eliminate difficult problems in production and as-needed Required Qualifications: 2+ years of professional experience as a visual effects artist in games or related industries Experience working Unity, Unreal, or equivalent game engine VFX tools Desired Qualifications: Experience developing Unreal Blueprints Experience programming in C++ and UnrealScript As a part of the application process, candidates will be expected to provide a portfolio or demo reel of their work and may be asked to complete an art test. For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise and a collaborative spirit that prioritizes the delight of players. We will look at your past studies and experience, but for this role, we also look for dedicated people with a personal relationship with games. If you embody player empathy and care about players' experiences, this is the role for you! Our Perks: Riot focuses on work/life balance, shown by our open paid time off policy and other perks such as flexible work schedules. We offer medical, dental, and life insurance, parental leave for you, your spouse/domestic partner, and children, and a 401k with company match. Check out our benefits pages for more information. At Riot Games, we put players first. That mission drives every decision in our quest to create games and experiences that make it better to be a player. Whether you’re working directly on a new player-facing experience or you’re supporting the company as a whole, everyone at Riot is part of our mission. And just like in our games, we’re better when we work together. Our goal is to create collaborative teams where you are empowered to bring your unique perspective everyday. If that sounds like the kind of place you want to work, we’re looking forward to your application. It’s our policy to provide equal employment opportunity for all applicants and members of Riot Games, Inc. Riot Games makes reasonable accommodations for handicapped and disabled Rioters and does not unlawfully discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, handicap, veteran status, marital status, criminal history, or any other category protected by applicable federal and state law. We consider for employment all qualified applicants, including those with criminal histories, in a manner consistent with applicable federal, state and local law, including the California Fair Chance Act, the City of Los Angeles Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, and the Washington Fair Chance Act. Per the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, the following core duties may create a basis for disqualifying candidates with relevant criminal histories: Safeguarding confidential and sensitive Company data Communication with others, including Rioters and third parties such as vendors, and/or players, including minors Accessing Company assets, secure digital systems, and networks Ensuring a safe interactive environment for players and other Rioters These duties are directly related to essential operations, safety, trust, and compliance obligations within our organization. Please note that job duties may evolve based on business needs and additional responsibilities may be assigned as necessary to maintain operational efficiency and security. (Los Angeles Only) Base salary range between $109,200.00 - $153,300.00 USD + incentive compensation + equity + 401K with company match + medical, dental, vision, and life insurance + short and long-term disability + open PTO.Apply

apiJob.title: VO Designer III (Contract)
apiJob.description:
AudioVO Designer III (Contract)SingaporeJob Id: 6038Riot Games was founded on the principles that putting players first leads to exceptional experiences. Since the launch of League of Legends in 2009, millions of players around the world log in each month to connect through our games and the characters that bring them to life. As we continue to expand our global content portfolio, we’re seeking a VO Designer III (Contract) based in Singapore to support voice productions across Riot’s products and select partnerships. That's where you come in. The VO Designer III guides the creative, technical, and production processes required to deliver high-quality VO content for Riot experiences. This hands-on role supports a small team of voice designers, collaborates with cross-disciplinary partners, and ensures VO assets reinforce character identity, narrative clarity, and an exceptional player experience. This is a craft supervision role focused on voice design. Responsibilities: Voice Design Creative Alignment Support Audio leads on voice design productions by assisting with scoping, coordination, and execution across VO workflows. Support established voice design direction by ensuring VO clarity, feasibility, and creative alignment across character, gameplay, and skin content. Represent voice design in kickoff and alignment meetings, sharing relevant creative context and direction. Provide clear, actionable feedback on VO work from internal and external partners. Scoping, Production & Implementation Support Assist in identifying VO opportunities, risks, and constraints, and align with Voice and Audio stakeholders on scope before production commitments. Collaboration with Production & Craft leads to clarify requirements and voice design implications. Support VO asset delivery, localization preparation, and technical implementation in Wwise and the game engine. Help troubleshoot VO-related issues during integration and playtest cycles. Vendor & Team Support Support external or outsourced voice designers through day-to-day guidance and review. Review vendor deliverables to ensure quality, consistency, and alignment with voice design expectations. Perform hands-on VO polish or support work when required. Quality & Process Help uphold creative and technical quality standards for VO assets. Validate technical specs and support in-engine verification. Follow and support established VO workflows, documentation, and delivery practices. Required Qualifications: 5+ years of experience developing audio for games, including shipped titles. Strong experience with voice-over production, processing tools, and techniques. Solid understanding of end-to-end game audio pipelines, including implementation and player experience considerations. Hands-on experience with game engines and Wwise audio middleware. Proficiency with standard audio creation tools (DAWs and common audio plug-ins). Ability to provide clear direction and timely, actionable feedback. Strong communication skills, with the ability to convey complex ideas clearly in English. Desired Qualifications: Familiarity with League of Legends and its characters, products, and player community. Experience mentoring or providing craft guidance to other designers. Experience directing professional voice actors in recording sessions. Familiarity with designing and maintaining dialogue systems and workflows within live-service development pipelines. Experience with advanced or specialized audio tools (e.g., Reaktor, synthesizers, or audio scripting). Familiarity with scripting or audio tooling (e.g., Lua or audio efficiency tools). Wwise certification or equivalent hands-on experience. Mandarin language proficiency is a plus. Employment Type: employment contract with Adecco, a professional personnel company in Singapore. Please note that Riot Games does not offer relocation packages for this position. You need to be able to work legally in Singapore, without Riot Games’ sponsorship, to be consideredApply

apiJob.title: ART, ANIMATION & SOUND​​​​​​​
apiJob.description: ART, ANIMATION & SOUND​​​​​​​ It takes artists of all kinds to bring the vision of our games to life.Artists add color and style to Blizzard characters, environments, cinematics, interfaces, web pages, comics, and more. They embrace the Blizzard style that’s persisted throughout our games—recognizable silhouettes and strong colors that guide players and add clarity and cohesion. They can create the artistic diversity that make up a Blizzard game. Whether that be painting muscle-bound orcs or glittering starscapes without sacrificing usability. Artists work with a variety of tools to make fantasies real and craft inviting worlds that spark the imagination of your peers. The beautiful (or terrifying) art they create ultimately supports and informs gameplay.Blizzard Sound collaborates with game designers to craft an audio experience that complements the gameplay and utilizes a collective artistic ‘voice’ in furthering a storyline via the medium of sound. The team has an outstanding ability to not only create excellent, original content, but to successfully integrate it into the final product--working with game designers, actors, artists, producers, and programmers to make sure that great concepts make the transition from the microphone to the game on the shelves. We’re looking for talented people who have a strong creative vision and a desire to wield mighty sonic weaponry in their pursuit of audio perfection! Our world-class video and post-production (VPP) team is responsible for expanding the lore and storytelling of our games through in-game cinematics and cut scenes, external shorts, and much more. VPP is part of Blizzard’s award winning story and franchise development team. Their mission is to support Blizzard's marketing and communications efforts through the development of epic digital content designed to inform, entertain, and engage Blizzard fans everywhere. ​​​​​​​View Open Jobs body { background-image: url(https://cdn.phenompeople.com/CareerConnectResources/prod/BLENGLOBAL/images/art-animation-sound_background-1589530563752.jpg); background-position: top; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: auto 1000px; background-color: #002650 !important; } @media screen and (max-width: 1280px) { body { background-size: auto 910px !important; } } @media screen and (max-width: 1024px) { body { background-size: auto 600px !important; } } .hero-block.short-header, .heading-block-hide.ph-fRtyv-bg, section[instance-id="vWcO9I"] div[instance-id="vWcO9I"] { background-color: transparent !important; } .job-info, .job-info span, .job-description { font-family: 'OpenSans-Regular' !important; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) !important; } section[instance-id="vWcO9I"] .ph-card .ph-card-block { transition: all .5s ease; } section[instance-id="vWcO9I"] .ph-card:hover .ph-card-block { background-color: rgba(1, 174, 255, 0.2) !important; border-color:rgba(0,174,255,.5) !important; } #footer .footer-block .footer-top-block { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); }

apiJob.title: GAME DESIGN
apiJob.description: GAME DESIGN Designers find the joy in our ideas.​​​​​​​Game designers shape the challenges and tune the weapons that our players run amok with. They make sure that our games delight the mind with interesting interactions between players and AI. It is their mission to construct mechanics that don’t require a manual to understand, keeping in mind that the best games are easy to learn, but difficult to master. Designers create fun for everyone, from hardcore competitors to casual weekend gamers. Blizzard designers aren’t just “idea people”—they find elegant and enduring designs everywhere, and implement them effectively with scripting, layout and testing. With world editing software at their fingertips, they iterate until our gameplay and user experiences shine as brightly as any gorgeous environment or stirring soundtrack. apiJob.title: UX & VISUAL DESIGN
apiJob.description: UX & VISUAL DESIGN Designers bring our dreams to reality.​​​​​​​Delivering epic entertainment experiences begins with elegant and intuitive User Experience (UX) and Visual Design. Our designers work closely with game designers, artists, and engineers to conceptualize, design, and iterate across all gameplay features and systems ensuring everything feels cohesive and easy to use from day one. Usability interviews, Web and business intelligence (BI) analytics, multivariate statistics, and data mining are the tricks of the trade they use to help our teams understand what our users are doing and why. apiJob.title: Creative Director - Visual & Motion Design
apiJob.description: <p>As a Creative Director at AKQA (part of WPP)&nbsp;you will bridge creative vision and execution across static and motion media. You will lead and mentor a team of UI/UX, visual &amp; motion designers, define high-quality visual standards, drive storytelling through creative ideation and ensure cohesive brand expression across campaigns, digital platforms, film/animation, and interactive media. You will partner closely with creative leadership, strategy, clients (internal or external), and production to deliver compelling, on-brand visual experiences.</p>\n<p>Your role is critical in elevating the visual voice of the agency, championing innovation in design, and translating big ideas into polished, emotionally engaging visual and animated work.</p>\n<p>Location - Mumbai&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>Role Requirements</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>12+ years of experience with a strong, diverse portfolio showcasing visual design, motion graphics, storytelling, animation, brand work, interactive pieces, and campaign-level thinking</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Expert proficiency in Adobe Creative Cloud (After Effects, Premiere Pro, Illustrator, Photoshop)</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Skilled in animation, compositing, visual effects, motion typography</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Experience in 3D tools (Cinema 4D, Blender, Maya, or equivalent) preferred</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Understanding of UI / UX motion (app/web animations)</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to work with Lottie / vector motion / web-embedded assets is a plus</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>You should be able to translate strategy or messaging into visually compelling narratives—static or motion</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to lead a team, guide, critique, mentor junior &amp; mid-level designers, and uphold quality and consistency across teams</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Comfortable working with creative directors, strategists, copywriters, producers, developers, and clients</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to articulate design rationale and present work convincingly</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ensuring final deliverables meet aesthetic, technical, and brand standards</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Stay updated on motion, design trends, tools, and evolving formats, bring fresh ideas and push visual boundaries</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Be comfortable to work in agency and on site client location as needed</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to estimate work effort, plan in collaboration with the program team and ensure consistent velocity of work output<br><br></p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>Qualifications &amp; Characteristics</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>You inspire and develop designers, giving constructive feedback and encouraging growth.</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Balance creative ambition with constraints, adapt quickly to changing briefs, and find smart solutions.</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Present ideas and design decisions with clarity and confidence to diverse stakeholders.</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Thrive in fast-paced environments, manage pressure, and maintain quality under tight timelines.</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>You believe in collaboration, respect diverse perspectives, and build camaraderie across creative, strategy, and production teams</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Possess great written and verbal communication skills</p>\n</li>\n</ul><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Interactive Visual Designer
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA (part of WPP) we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create beautiful ideas, products and services. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive digital services and applications that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.</p>\n<p>As an Interactive Visual Designer in the design team, you will shape user experiences for our client’s digital channels, ensuring that each interaction is intuitive, engaging, and reflects design excellence. You will design vibrant, usable, and technically sound visual experiences across digital touchpoints for our clients. You will focus on the intersection of motion, interface, and visual storytelling — enhancing usability through aesthetic and interactive visual designs. You will collaborate closely with UX, product, engineering, and design teams to bring ideas and concepts to life while maintaining visual and brand integrity.</p>\n<p>Your work will ensure that every screen, transition, micro-interaction, and visual asset aligns with established design ethos, elevating the creative vision and brand experience.</p>\n<p>Location - Mumbai&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>Role Requirements</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>6-8 years’ experience in visual, interactive, or UI design roles within agency, product, or digital studio environments</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Strong portfolio demonstrating interactive and/or motion-focused design across web &amp; mobile form factors</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Proficiency in design and prototyping tools (Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD, Principle, Framer, etc.)</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Solid grounding in typography, layout, color, iconography, and visual hierarchy</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Experience designing responsive/ adaptive interfaces across multiple platforms</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Familiarity with design systems, component libraries, and style guides</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Basic understanding of front-end (HTML, CSS, JS) for developer collaboration</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent) in Graphic Design, Interaction Design, Visual Communication, or related field</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>Qualifications and Characteristics</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>Strong visual eye: balance, polish, and design integrity</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to craft smooth, thoughtful interactions and motion design</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Detail-oriented with a passion for pixel perfection and consistency</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Skilled at usability evaluation, prototyping, and iteration</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Comfortable working in a multi disciplinary set up and at client locations</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Curious and experimental — actively exploring trends, tools, and new techniques</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Resilient in fast-paced environments, adaptable to ambiguity and shifting priorities</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Proactive mindset, ownership mentality, and accountability from ideation to delivery</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Possess great written and verbal communication skills</p>\n</li>\n</ul><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Creative Director
apiJob.description: <div>\n<div>\n<div>\n<div>\n<div>\n<div>At AKQA, we believe in the imaginative application of art, technology, and human insight to create meaningful experiences that shape the future. With an entrepreneurial and experimental mindset, we design ideas, products, and environments that don’t just communicate, they transform how people live, feel, and connect.</div>\n<div><br>As a Creative Director, Art, you will guide the visual direction across campaigns, platforms, identity expressions, film, social content, and integrated communication. You will lead multidisciplinary teams to develop world-class ideas, elevate craft, and ensure every visual output feels intentional, distinctive, and culturally resonant.</div>\n<div><br>You have a strong point of view, a refined sense of taste, and a deep understanding of how design and storytelling create meaning. You lead through inspiration, clarity, and creative pressure.<br>At AKQA you will have access to world-renowned thought leadership. You will work in an environment which fosters a meritocratic culture and encourages ownership, and you will be surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields.<br><br>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</div>\n<ul>\n<li>Direct with aesthetic conviction. You define the visual heartbeat of the idea, the mood, the palette, the rhythm, the cinematic energy, and you pull teams toward a stronger, sharper story through visuals.</li>\n<li>Lead with creative hunger. Drive concepts, visuals, and design systems with the energy of a maker and the ambition of a leader, pushing every idea to be braver, sharper, and more culturally relevant.</li>\n<li>Be a storyteller with taste. Shape narratives through visuals, composition, rhythm, and emotion, not just decoration. Every frame, layout, and edit must convey intention, story, and meaning.</li>\n<li>Craft with obsession. Whether it’s a platform identity, a film, a digital experience, a product UI, or a prototype, treat details like a signature. Your work should feel unmistakably world-class.</li>\n<li>Think beyond the screen. Build ideas that live as acts, installations, products, content ecosystems, and tech-enabled experiences, not just campaigns. Bring innovation and experimentation into the room naturally.</li>\n<li>Make ideas PR-able by design. Create visuals and concepts that earn cultural attention, not just meet a brief. Understand what travels regionally and globally, and design for impact.</li>\n<li>Elevate the room. Bring energy, references, inspiration, and ideas that push the team forward. Mentor juniors, shape thinking, and help raise the studio’s creative temperature.</li>\n<li>Challenge the brief, respectfully. Ask the questions others don’t. Find the tension, expose the opportunity, and push for the version of the work that truly moves people.</li>\n<li>Guard the quality. Be accountable for every output. Ensure every visual, layout, prototype, and film frame meets AKQA’s global standards and reflects the studio’s ambition.</li>\n<li>Mentor with generosity and pressure. You teach taste, discipline, and ambition. You show juniors what “good” looks like, and what “great” could be with two more pushes.</li>\n<li>Guard the quality with obsession. Every piece of communication that leaves the studio carries your imprint of excellence, consistent, intentional, unmistakably AKQA.</li>\n<li>Lead with informed curiosity. Stay attuned to visual culture, design movements, platform behaviours, emerging tools, and evolving aesthetics.</li>\n</ul>\n<div><br><br>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</div>\n<ul>\n<li>A portfolio demonstrating world-class art direction, visual storytelling, and integrated campaign craft and ideation.</li>\n<li>Experience leading multidisciplinary creative teams in communication-based environments.</li>\n<li>Strong sense of taste, composition, and storytelling through visuals.</li>\n<li>Deep cultural awareness, curiosity, and an experimental mindset</li>\n<li>Passion for pushing boundaries in mediums, formats, platforms, and ways of experiencing ideas.</li>\n<li>Confident communicator, clear, inspiring, and articulate.</li>\n<li>Passion for innovation, experimentation, and continually elevating craft.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>We are proactively engaging with talent for a prospective role in preparation for future business needs.</p>\n</div>\n<div>\n<div>Explore our extensive range of benefits&nbsp;<a href=\"https://www.akqa.com/studios/mena/benefits/\"><strong>here.</strong></a></div>\n</div>\n</div>\n<div>&nbsp;</div>\n<div>&nbsp;</div>\n</div>\n<div>\n<div>&nbsp;</div>\n</div>\n</div>\n</div><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. apiJob.title: Experience Designer
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create beautiful ideas, products and services. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive digital services and applications that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.</p>\n<p>Experience Designers at AKQA apply empathy, systems thinking, and craftsmanship to strategic insights — designing groundbreaking solutions to human problems. Adept storytellers and fearless innovators, they create interactive experiences, products and services that move the world.&nbsp;</p>\n<p>The Experience Designer plays an essential role in the growth of the Experience Design department. They will draw together client, business and customer/end-user requirements, within an understanding of the technical delivery environment, to develop a blueprint for the solution. They are the user-centered glue that binds together business, creative, and technology into a harmonious collaboration—facilitating design workshops, working with multi-disciplinary teams to deliver award-winning, impactful work.</p>\n<p>At AKQA Dubai, located in Media City, in Dubai, you’ll have the opportunity to produce meaningful work for world-class companies in one of the world’s most vibrant and beautiful cities, with access to our network of specialists across the global network of studios. You will work in an environment that fosters a dynamic and meritocratic culture, surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields.</p>\n<p>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Apply solid user experience and usability principles while looking for opportunities to innovate</li>\n<li>Demonstrate excellent knowledge of all aspects of the UCD approach and the ability to apply them flexibly across a variety of project types</li>\n<li>Able to contribute at a high level to the overall strategic client approach, taking into account relevant marketplace, consumer and technology factors--and a keen interest in growing within more strategic &amp; CX-focused disciplines&nbsp;</li>\n<li>Able to use/introduce more advanced UCD techniques (rapid prototyping, remote testing etc.) to improve efficiency in the user experience process and the quality of the solution</li>\n<li>Able to develop solutions for a wide variety of touchpoints, platforms and devices including mobile, web, kiosk, social, physical, etc.</li>\n<li>Lead User Experience work streams on large-scale and complex projects</li>\n<li>Promote collaborative work practices, and identify opportunities to improve quality and increase efficiency through collaborative design</li>\n<li>Demonstrate cross-functional understanding; clearly articulate purpose and value of other disciplines within Strategic Services, identifying when their input is needed</li>\n<li>Collaborate with the client and with various teams within AKQA. Ability to lead workshops and manage mid to senior stakeholders. Experience of nurturing client relationships</li>\n<li>Provide support, guidance and mentoring to junior members of the User Experience Team</li>\n<li>Take an active role in new business pitches where appropriate</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Embrace challenges and inspire new ways of thinking</li>\n<li>Expertise in understanding digital behaviours, cultural expectations and social networking (preferred experience with Asia or luxury industries)</li>\n<li>Fluent in English with a strong command of the language, both written and spoken</li>\n<li>A compelling portfolio of unique work that spans mediums, including: mobile applications, responsive web, product &amp; service design.&nbsp;</li>\n<li>Wide breadth of experience in your portfolio demonstrating skills across Research, Strategy, IA, Design and Testing. Experience with ethnographic research, ecosystem design, information architecture, and user testing and experience with innovation processes including Design Thinking workshops, Google Design Sprints, Business Model and/or Value Proposition canvas</li>\n<li>Expertise with prototyping tools such; along with design tools such as Sketch &amp; Figma.</li>\n<li>Proven creative success working in collaborative, multi-functional teams</li>\n<li>Strong presentation skills, visual and written</li>\n<li>Breadth of cultural reference points</li>\n<li>You have a drive to break boundaries and craft the best ideas of their kind in the world</li>\n<li>You are passionate, driven and obsessed about your craft and stay on top of best practice in your field</li>\n</ul><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Senior Designer
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA, we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create a better future. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive ideas, services and experiences that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.</p>\n<p>Designers at AKQA apply systems thinking and craft to create brands, products, and experiences that people genuinely want to use, wear, share, and come back to. In a multidisciplinary environment, they translate insight into form, shaping identities, interfaces, and design languages that feel both culturally alive and beautifully precise.</p>\n<p>As a Senior Designer in MENA, you'll play an essential role in shaping the design vision and craft of work across brand, digital, product, experience and campaign. You'll help define and build design systems, produce exceptional work, identities and prototypes, and collaborate closely with creative, strategy, tech, delivery and production to create transformative work for regional and global clients.</p>\n<p>At AKQA you will have access to world-renowned thought leadership from influential authors, athletes, artists and entrepreneurs. You will work in an environment which fosters a meritocratic culture and encourages ownership, and you will be surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields.&nbsp;</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Lead with maker energy. Drive design, craft, and execution with pace and pride, raising the bar on every visual, system, and experience, and pushing visuals to be bolder, clearer, and more culturally relevant.</li>\n<li>Think in systems, not assets. Build identities and design languages that scale across channels and evolve over time. Create rules and rythms, not just one-off screens.</li>\n<li>Craft with obsession. Sweat the details: spacing, alignment, type, transitions, iconography, accessibility, responsiveness. Your work should feel authored, intentional and world-class.</li>\n<li>Design beyond the screen. Bring the same design intelligence to environments, packaging, content ecosystems, installations and tech-enabled experiences. Understand how a brand behaves in the real world.</li>\n<li>Make work that travels. Create a design with PR potential: iconic, ownable, culturally legible. Understand what will land locally in MENA and what will travel globally.</li>\n<li>Own the process end-to-end. From early explorations and mood boards to design development, artworking, production files and QA, you shepherd quality through every phase.</li>\n<li>Collaborate like a modern designer. Work fluidly with writers, strategists, creative directors, technologists, makers, AI tools and the broader AKQA network. Invite critique and use friction to sharpen outcomes.</li>\n<li>Present with clarity and taste. Tell the design story: the rationale, the system, the choices and the craft, guiding clients through what matters and why it works.</li>\n<li>Guard the standard. Be accountable for every deliverable. Ensure every layout, screen, prototype, deck page and asset meets AKQA's global level and reflects the studio's ambition.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>A compelling portfolio demonstrating design craft and systems thinking across brand, digital, product, campaign and/or experience work.</li>\n<li>Strong ability to develop visual identities, design systems</li>\n<li>Confident in typography, composition, hierarchy and grid systems; high attention to detail.</li>\n<li>Proven success working in collaborative, multi-functional teams.</li>\n<li>Strong design presentation skills (visual and written).</li>\n<li>Culturally literate with a breadth of reference points, and the ability to translate culture into design decisions (not just mood boards).</li>\n<li>Hungry to push boundaries and make work that is distinctive, modern and craft-led.</li>\n<li>Passionate about design best practices and continuously improving your craft.</li>\n<li>Experience in presenting to clients and supporting senior leads is advantageous.</li>\n<li>Degree in Design, Visual Communication, Interaction Design, Visual Studies or related field preferred.</li>\n<li>Extensive experience with industry-standard tools (e.g. Figma, Adobe Creative Suite...).</li>\n<li>Appreciation for production realities: print, digital delivery, responsive behaviour and quality assurance.</li>\n<li>Supplementary skills appreciated: motion design, photography, illustration, 3D, generative/AI workflows, digital installations, creative coding.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;Explore our extensive range of benefits <a href=\"https://www.akqa.com/studios/cairo/benefits/\">here</a>&nbsp;</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Creative Director (Tokyo)
apiJob.description: <p>As a Creative Director and the leader of the AKQA Tokyo (part of WPP) studio’s Creative department, you will create and inspire work that is distinctive, unfamiliar, effective and truly remarkable to make a difference to consumers’ behavior through ideas, creativity and the use of interactive media. You will inspire and lead a team to raise their bar even higher, mentoring a team, leading by example and championing the discipline in the wider agency and beyond.&nbsp;</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>Role Requirements</strong></p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Deliver and inspire award-winning work from both yourself and others who work with you, influencing where appropriate a dramatic change through ideas, creativity and the use of interactive media.</li>\n<li>Lead, direct and manage cross-disciplinary and culturally diverse set of talents, both internal and external to AKQA to deliver successful solutions and high-quality works to clients on time.</li>\n<li>Create ground-breaking work that positively impacts our clients, our teams and the world.</li>\n<li>Foster and line-manage creatives that are eager to grow their craft in art direction, copywriting or design.</li>\n<li>High level of accuracy and attention to detail.</li>\n<li>Learn new skills and stay abreast of technical and digital design developments, and successfully apply them to work practices to help improve processes and procedures.</li>\n<li>Act as the creative representative of the Tokyo studio within and outside AKQA network, in Japanese and in English. Work with other AKQA network creatives collaboratively on joint initiatives.</li>\n<li>Work closely with the strategy teams to shape briefs that empower our teams to deliver work that pushes our client's brand to the forefront of their global audience's minds</li>\n<li>&nbsp;</li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Creative briefs </strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Contributes to strategic development of a well-defined creative brief and any additional briefing documents, speaking with the client directly when necessary. Listens to and responds to a brief, understanding where/if there are gaps. Knows what questions to ask during the briefing session in order to act upon it. Understands how to respond to a brief.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Idea generation</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Leads by example to consistently inspire creative colleagues to originate world- class, pioneering ideas that conceptualize world-class solutions. Generates useful, usable ideas across all existing and emerging digital platforms. Continually develops practices and processes to inspire, innovate and harness new ways of thinking.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>◊</strong> <strong>New business development </strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Creatively leads new business pitches. Responsible for crisp ideas and creative workflow; effective and dynamic storyteller for oral pitch presentation in both Japanese &amp; English.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Creative craft skills</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Selects most appropriate supplier for required task. Successfully leads multiple suppliers, partners and clients to ensure outsourced projects are creatively delivered on time, within budget and to the highest standards. Helps to ensure AKQA continues to create unique and inspirational solutions.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Team management</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Manages creatives as direct reports. Provides an international and supportive working environment, based on openness, trust and regular constructive feedback on performance. Sets clear and achievable goals. Takes immediate action to address performance/conduct issues. Assesses a broad range of tasks and determines which team member should manage to ensure delivery to the highest standard. Is an ambassador for AKQA and its values at all times.</li>\n<li>Demonstrates creative success in leading collaborative multidisciplinary teams, including project planning, to winning a number of industry recognized awards.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Stakeholder management</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Successfully manages multiple suppliers, partners and customers to ensure the best outcome for both customer and AKQA. Keeps stakeholders informed of project progress at all times and manages expectations proactively.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Client Leadership</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Understand client business goals and ambitions. Takes briefs from clients and successfully creates stories that communicate client’s needs and ambitions to the consumers.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>AKQA Competencies</strong></p>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Innovation</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Seen as a transformational leader in the industry who is capable of driving change throughout an organization. Is able to articulate a compelling business case and can galvanize the team to action in face of change. Creates an environment that challenges traditional thinking, status quo, Japanese industry norms and ensures the company stays far ahead of competition and clients.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Service&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Able to deftly manage most senior client expectations, particularly those that conflict with the company’s recommendations, and can drive successful outcomes while maintaining (or even growing) the relationship. Develops strategies to build a climate of trust, openness and respect; forges strong relationships to drive successful outcomes.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Quality&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Has the ability to set the tone for the team and believes that without the greatest work, nothing else matters. Possesses a strong bias to action and is able to consistently deliver high quality work within required timeframes. Possesses a strong bias to action and is energized by challenges; is a visible champion of excellence and perfect delivery. Is upbeat and committed to their working life and makes a positive contribution to team morale.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Thought&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Develops long-term strategic partne

apiJob.title: Associate Creative Director (Tokyo)
apiJob.description: <p>AKQA (part of WPP) is a creative agency that transforms strategic insights into beautiful concepts through art and craftsmanship, guiding clients toward a better future.</p>\n<p><br>As an Associate Creative Director, you will be expected to go beyond the brief—developing strategic approaches based on consumer insight, generating bold and innovative ideas, and presenting them as compelling narratives to clients.<br><br></p>\n<p>At AKQA, our work extends far beyond advertising. From building brand and CX visions to designing digital and physical experiences, our projects span a wide range of disciplines. While leveraging your creative expertise built through past experience, you will also be expected to cross boundaries and take on new challenges in unexplored domains.<br><br></p>\n<p>In particular, AKQA Tokyo is on a mission to grow our team and become Japan’s leading creative agency—one that creates a better future for brands through transformative brand experiences that go beyond traditional marketing. We are looking for passionate, ambitious new talent to join us in this journey.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>Role Requirements</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Deliver and inspire award-winning work from both yourself and others who work with you, influencing where appropriate a dramatic change through ideas, creativity and the use of interactive media.</li>\n<li>Lead, direct and manage a cross-disciplinary and culturally diverse set of talents, both internal and external to AKQA to deliver successful solutions and high-quality works to clients on time.</li>\n<li>Create ground-breaking work that positively impacts our clients, our teams and the world.</li>\n<li>Foster and line-manage creatives that are eager to grow their craft in art direction, copywriting or design.</li>\n<li>Learn new skills and stay abreast of technical and digital design developments, and successfully apply them to work practices to help improve processes and procedures.</li>\n<li>Work with other AKQA network creatives collaboratively on joint initiatives.</li>\n<li>Work closely with the strategy teams to shape briefs that empower our teams to deliver work that pushes our client's brand to the forefront of their global audience's minds.</li>\n<li>Extensive hands-on experience in client work within Japan, with the ability to communicate effectively with both team members and clients in both Japanese and English.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>Key Responsibilities<br><br></p>\n<ul>\n<li>Creative briefs</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Contributes to strategic development of a well-defined creative brief and any additional briefing documents, speaking with the client directly when necessary. Listens to and responds to a brief, understanding where/if there are gaps. Knows what questions to ask during the briefing session in order to act upon it. Understands how to respond to a brief.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Idea generation<br>Leads by example to consistently inspire creative colleagues to originate world- class, pioneering ideas that conceptualize world-class solutions. Generates useful, usable ideas across all existing and emerging digital platforms. Continually develops practices and processes to inspire, innovate and harness new ways of thinking.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>New business development<br>Creatively leads new business pitches. Responsible for crisp ideas and creative workflow; effective and dynamic storyteller for oral pitch presentation.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Creative craft skills<br>Selects the most appropriate supplier for the required task. Successfully leads multiple suppliers, partners and clients to ensure outsourced projects are creatively delivered on time, within budget and to the highest standards. Helps to ensure AKQA continues to create unique and inspirational solutions.<br><br></li>\n<li>Stakeholder management<br>Successfully manages multiple suppliers, partners and customers to ensure the best outcome for both customer and AKQA. Keeps stakeholders informed of project progress at all times and manages expectations proactively.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Client Leadership<br>Understand client business goals and ambitions. Takes briefs from clients and successfully creates stories that communicate client’s needs and ambitions to the consumers.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Senior User Experience (UX) Designer
apiJob.description: <p>Experience Designers at AKQA (part of WPP) concept, craft and deliver interfaces that make technology more natural and enjoyable to use. In collaboration with strategists, researchers and technologists, our UI and UX designers take a human-centred approach to create beautiful and meaningful brand experiences.</p>\n<p>As a Senior UX Designer you will play an essential role balancing business, customer and technical requirements to craft blueprints for solutions that delight clients and users.</p>\n<p>As part of the AKQA team in Tokyo, you will work in a dynamic, globally-minded environment surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields. Together you will create world-class experiences for both Japanese and overseas markets.</p>\n<p><strong>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>Plan and execute core UX/CX deliverables including heuristic and IA audits, ecosystem maps, personas, customer journeys, service blueprints, and wireframes</li>\n<li>Collaborate across disciplines in both agile and waterfall processes to quickly deliver impactful solutions</li>\n<li>Present to business stakeholders to help them make informed decisions that strengthen their business</li>\n<li>Keep on top of best practices and trends to ensure we are at the forefront of the industry</li>\n<li>Lead and inspire, sharing your knowledge with peers and mentoring mid/junior designers<br><br></li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>A compelling portfolio demonstrating outstanding UX design, with a desire to become even better</li>\n<li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to make complex topics understandable, and present logically</li>\n<li>Excellent writing and editing skills, experienced in crafting effective, on-brand micro copy</li>\n<li>Mastery of whiteboard and prototyping software such as Miro and Figma</li>\n<li>A “can-do” attitude, eager to embrace big challenges</li>\n<li>Attention to detail and a passion for getting to the root of a problem</li>\n<li>Ability to thrive in a global team, with an open mind to fresh perspectives</li>\n<li>Proven experience working in a Senior UX Design role (agency or in-house)</li>\n<li>A degree in Interaction Design, Information Architecture or other design-related field is preferred</li>\n<li>Fluency in Japanese at N1 or native level is required</li>\n<li>Conversational or higher English ability is preferred but not required</li>\n</ul>\n<p>#LI-DNI</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Associate Design Director (XD) (UKA) (Tokyo)
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA (part of WPP) we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create beautiful ideas, products and services. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive digital services and experiences that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.&nbsp;</p>\n<p>The Associate Design Director at AKQA will approach every brief with fresh eyes. Avoiding familiar solutions, the candidate will create and inspire work that is distinctive, effective and truly remarkable. They lead by example to consistently inspire creative colleagues to create world-class, pioneering ideas that conceptualise world-class solutions, while acting as a strategic and conceptual leader on projects. Associate Design Directors at AKQA display a cohesive understanding and can execute the principles that make innovative and effective digital communications, interface design, and interaction design.</p>\n<p>We exist to create the future with our clients and that partnership is the basis of our practice. We work collaboratively across client teams to ensure each experience is of the highest quality and has a measurable impact on the customer and business alike.</p>\n<p>As part of the AKQA team in Tokyo, you will work in a dynamic, globally-minded environment surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields. Together you will create world-class experiences for both Japanese and overseas markets.</p>\n<p><strong>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>Sets creative direction throughout all phases of project work from discovery to launch and beyond with ongoing optimization</li>\n<li>Acts as a creative lead for one or more accounts, managing multiple tracks of work across a variety of teams</li>\n<li>Works internally and with clients to develop the strategy, experience concepts and establish the overarching design direction for the experience</li>\n<li>Produces compelling and highly usable experience solutions in response to client needs</li>\n<li>Communicates and represents creative vision and execution with client partners</li>\n<li>Continually develops processes to inspire, innovate, and harness new ways of thinking</li>\n<li>Inspires and leads by example, setting professional standards for the team and the department</li>\n<li>Actively trains, mentors, and manages junior to mid-level creatives and designers.</li>\n<li>Responsible for managing and guiding junior to mid-level creatives’ careers within AKQA (including regular one-on-one check-ins), writing and delivering annual performance reviews, and taking responsibility for on-boarding new employees and guiding them through a successful tenure at AKQA</li>\n<li>Creatively participates in new business pitches – i.e. responsible for ideas and creative work, and competently presents pitches</li>\n<li>Be able to guide but also prepared to be hands on with exceptional experience in industry design tools<br><br></li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>A minimum of 7 years’ experience in the creative industry</li>\n<li>Native or fluent Japanese reading and speaking ability is essential.</li>\n<li>All candidates must possess a portfolio showcasing a comprehensive understanding of how l their creative disciplines comes to life and how they applied their thinking, including conceptual and executional (art direction, user experience and UI design) contribute to a finished product</li>\n<li>Demonstrated creative success in leading collaborative cross disciplinary teams</li>\n<li>A solid understanding of the marketing industry at large; an ability and a desire to adapt to the changing landscape of technology</li>\n<li>Experience in, and enthusiasm for, creating digital platforms and products from brief to delivery and beyond.</li>\n<li>Experience in side-by-side collaboration with UX and development teams and leaders</li>\n<li>Strong working knowledge of user interface, application, mobile and responsive design</li>\n<li>Exceptional communication skills: Verbal, written, interpersonal and inter-departmental</li>\n<li>Superb professionalism and mature presence in all aspects of the job</li>\n<li>Thought leadership: A strong point of view; ability to contribute to the strategic development of an assignment; creative ideas and the ability to promote conceptual thinking among the team</li>\n</ul>\n<p>#LI-DNI</p>\n<p><br><br></p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Senior UI Designer
apiJob.description: <p>Experience Designers at AKQA (part of WPP) concept, craft and deliver interfaces that make technology more natural and enjoyable to use. In collaboration with strategists, researchers and technologists, our UI and UX designers take a human-centred approach to create beautiful and meaningful brand experiences.</p>\n<p>As a Senior UI Designer, you will play an essential role in conception and design; bringing exceptional creative thinking and craft to deliver digital experiences that delight clients and users.</p>\n<p>As part of the AKQA team in Tokyo, you will work in a dynamic, globally-minded environment surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields. Together you will create world-class experiences for both Japanese and overseas markets.</p>\n<p>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Demonstrate world-class execution of innovative and effective digital communication design, interface design, and interaction design across all digital platforms.</li>\n<li>Consistently deliver systematic, responsive design solutions through an agile methodology.</li>\n<li>Apply your skills in pitches to bring ideas to life, inspiring and exciting potential clients.</li>\n<li>Present design work confidently to stakeholders, and build trusting relationships.</li>\n<li>Ideate, co-design and refine with peers and clients in a positive and collaborative manner.</li>\n<li>Ensure projects and tasks are delivered on time, on budget, and to the highest quality.</li>\n<li>Learn new skills and stay abreast of design and technical developments. Advocate for and apply best practices to keep our team at the forefront of the industry.</li>\n<li>Keep on top of current and upcoming cultural trends — both in Japan and globally.</li>\n<li>Lead and inspire, sharing your knowledge with peers and mentoring mid/junior designers.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>EXPERIENCE AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Outstanding typography and layout skills; demonstrating range and subtlety.</li>\n<li>Sensitivity to colour, shadows, motion and details that others may not consciously notice.</li>\n<li>Exceptional design aesthetics with a portfolio to demonstrate.</li>\n<li>Experience in creating and presenting concepts through mood boards and prototypes.</li>\n<li>Experience in taking designs from low-fidelity wireframes to polished digital products.</li>\n<li>Experience in atomic design principles and building design systems that scale.</li>\n<li>Understanding of usability and accessibility best practices.</li>\n<li>Understanding of the technical possibilities and limitations of web and app development.</li>\n<li>Excellent verbal, visual and written communication skills, with the ability to present logically, objectively and inspiringly.</li>\n<li>Native or fluent Japanese reading and speaking ability is essential.</li>\n<li>Intermediate or higher English ability is preferred.</li>\n<li>Ability to thrive in a global team, with an open mind to fresh perspectives.</li>\n<li>Strong experience in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite and prototyping tools.</li>\n<li>Proven experience working in a Senior Design role (agency or client-side).</li>\n<li>A degree in Design, Interaction Design, or other design-related field is preferred.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>#LI-DNI</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics.
